prediction_outcome: No pre-registered scenario fully confirmed. 'Recent' dominance was unpredicted. K-preserve reversal on Llama disconfirms Scenario A.
key_finding: 'Recent' (StreamingLLM) achieves 100% at 33% budget on BOTH models. Early_priority catastrophically bad (8.7% Llama@33%). K-preserve WORSE than H2O on Llama (phantom routing). Head-selective +8.7pp over H2O. Digital encoding more compression-robust.
evidence_impact: Added findings #65-69. Updated narrative synthesis for compression. Answered open question #5. K>V perturbation hierarchy does NOT directly translate to compression advantage.
next_planned: Validate with true attention-based H2O; test recent strategy on harder tasks; combine head_selective + recent

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama. Head x position ENCODING-DEPENDENT.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent. CASCADING IS GENERAL on Llama.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute. K>V does NOT translate directly to compression.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama. Head-selective compression +8.7pp over H2O.

natural_usage.status: SUBSTANTIALLY ADVANCED: First eviction benchmark complete. Recent=best. Head-selective outperforms H2O. K-preserve reversal discovered. Encoding-dependent compression robustness established.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 variants. Eviction benchmark on 2 models.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + compression implications: digital=compression-robust (random@33%=95%), analog=fragile (random@33%=70%).
